1	<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
2	<!DOCTYPE mapper
3	        PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
4	        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
5	
6	<mapper namespace="fan.summer.database.mapper.excel.ComplexSplitConfigMapper">
7	    <insert id="insert"
8	            parameterType="fan.summer.database.entity.excel.ComplexSplitConfigEntity"
9	            useGeneratedKeys="true"
10	            keyProperty="id">
11	        INSERT INTO complex_split_config
12	            (task_id, field_name, sheet_name, header_index, column_index)
13	        VALUES (#{taskId}, #{fieldName}, #{sheetName}, #{headerIndex}, #{columnIndex})
14	    </insert>
15	    <delete id="deleteAllByTaskId"
16	            parameterType="string"
17	    >
18	        delete
19	        from complex_split_config
20	        where task_id = #{taskId}
21	    </delete>
22	    <select id="selectAllByTaskId"
23	            parameterType="string"
24	            resultType="fan.summer.database.entity.excel.ComplexSplitConfigEntity">
25	        select *
26	        from complex_split_config
27	        where task_id = #{taskId}
28	    </select>
29	
30	    <update id="update"
31	            parameterType="fan.summer.database.entity.excel.ComplexSplitConfigEntity"
32	    >
33	        UPDATE complex_split_config
34	        SET
35	            header_index = #{headerIndex},
36	            column_index = #{columnIndex}
37	        WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
38	          AND sheet_name = #{sheetName}
39	    </update>
40	</mapper>

1	<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" ?>
2	<!DOCTYPE configuration
3	        PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Config 3.0//EN"
4	        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-config.dtd">
5	
6	<configuration>
7	
8	    <settings>
9	        <setting name="mapUnderscoreToCamelCase" value="true"/>
10	        <setting name="lazyLoadingEnabled" value="true"/>
11	        <setting name="logImpl" value="STDOUT_LOGGING"/>
12	        <setting name="localCacheScope" value="STATEMENT"/>
13	        <setting name="cacheEnabled" value="false"/>
14	    </settings>
15	
16	    <environments default="swisskit">
17	        <environment id="swisskit">
18	            <transactionManager type="JDBC"/>
19	            <dataSource type="POOLED">
20	                <property name="driver" value="org.h2.Driver"/>
21	                <property name="url" value="${db.url}"/>
22	                <property name="poolMaximumActiveConnections" value="10"/>
23	                <property name="poolMaximumIdleConnections" value="5"/>
24	            </dataSource>
25	        </environment>
26	    </environments>
27	
28	    <mappers>
29	        <mapper resource="mapper/setting/email/SwissKitSettingEmailMapper.xml"/>
30	        <mapper resource="mapper/excel/ComplexSplitConfigMapper.xml"/>
31	        <mapper resource="mapper/setting/email/EmailAddressBookMapper.xml"/>

1	-- SwissKit Database Initialization Script
2	
3	-- Email Settings Table
4	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS swiss_kit_setting_email
5	(
6	    id           INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
7	    email        VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
8	    password     VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
9	    smtp_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
10	    smtp_port    INTEGER      NOT NULL,
11	    need_tls     INTEGER      NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
12	    need_ssl     INTEGER      NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
13	    from_address VARCHAR(255)
14	);
15	
16	-- Excel Complex Split Config Table
17	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS complex_split_config
18	(
19	    id           INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
20	    task_id      VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
21	    field_name   VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
22	    sheet_name   VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
23	    header_index INTEGER      NOT NULL,
24	    column_index INTEGER      NOT NULL
25	);
26	
27	-- Email Address Book Table
28	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_address_book
29	(
30	    id            INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
31	    email_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
32	    nickname      VARCHAR(255),
33	    tags          VARCHAR(1000)
34	);
35	
36	-- Email Tag Table
37	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_tag
38	(
39	    id  INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
40	    tag VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE
41	);
42	
43	-- Email Mass Sent Config Table
44	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_mass_sent_config
45	(
46	    id              INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
47	    task_id         VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
48	    to_tag          VARCHAR(255),
49	    cc_tag          VARCHAR(255),
50	    is_sent_att     INTEGER      NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
51	    att_folder_path VARCHAR(255)
52	);
53	
54	-- Email Sent Log Table
55	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_sent_log
56	(
57	    id          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
58	    "to"        VARCHAR(1000),
59	    cc          VARCHAR(1000),
60	    bcc         VARCHAR(1000),
61	    subject     VARCHAR(500),
62	    content     TEXT,
63	    attachment  VARCHAR(1000),
64	    send_time   TIMESTAMP   DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
65	    is_success  INTEGER     NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
66	);
67	
68	-- Menu Order Table (for drag-and-drop reordering)
69	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS menu_order
70	(
71	    id         INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
72	    page_class VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
73	    menu_order INTEGER NOT NULL
74	);
75	
76	-- App Settings Table (key-value store for application settings)
77	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS app_setting
78	(
79	    id           INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
80	    setting_key  VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
81	    setting_value VARCHAR(1000)
82	);
83	
84	-- Insert default language setting only if not exists
85	INSERT INTO app_setting (setting_key, setting_value)
86	SELECT 'language', 'en'
87	WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM app_setting WHERE setting_key = 'language');
88	
89	-- Plugin Manager Table (for external plugin management)
90	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plugin_manager
91	(
92	    id              INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
93	    jar_name        VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
94	    plugin_name     VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
95	    plugin_version  VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
96	    is_disabled     INTEGER      NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
97	    update_url      VARCHAR(1000),
98	    last_check      TIMESTAMP,
99	    installed_at    TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
100	);
101	
102	
103
